raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Legislators were very clear that Sexually Violent Predators needed secure housing and monitoring that would keep the community safe.",
    "Without a designated address, a Sexually Violent Predator's release is considered a Transient Release.",
    "By law, all conditional releases of Sexually Violent Predators must be monitored and supervised by the Department of State Hospitals.",
    "Previous transient release cases have shown to result in repeat offenses, especially with high-risk sex offenders.",
    "A Transient Release should not be granted under any circumstance.",
    "It is the responsibility of the judicial system to prioritize public safety.",
    "Stephenson has a history of sexual violence dating back to the 1980s.",
    "Stephenson was sentenced to 30 years in state prison for his crimes.",
    "Stephenson violated parole by bypassing electronic monitoring.",
    "Stephenson was assessed as a high risk sex offender and committed to the Department of State Hospitals."
  ]
}
```
